## System Overview

*Brief description of what you're building.*

## Submission Details

**Repository or diagrams:**
*(Link to repo, or attach architecture diagrams)*

**Load expectations:**
- RPS at peak:
- Data volume (DB size / event volume):
- Concurrency (max simultaneous users / workers):

**Deployment model:**
- [ ] Serverless (Lambda, Cloud Functions, etc.)
- [ ] Containerised (ECS, Kubernetes, etc.)
- [ ] Bare metal / VMs
- [ ] PaaS (Heroku, Railway, Render, etc.)
- [ ] Hybrid

**Primary tech stack:**
*(Language, framework, database, queue)*

## What You Want

- [ ] Full bottleneck register
- [ ] Scalability score
- [ ] Failure-mode analysis
- [ ] Prioritised remediation plan
- [ ] Go / No-Go launch verdict

*Do you have a launch date or deadline?*

## Additional Context
